title: cynanchum racemosum var. racemosum
intro: Cynanchum racemosum var. racemosum, also known as Black swallow-wort or Vincetoxicum officinale, is a plant species in the dogbane family Apocynaceae. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antiviral properties. The plant is believed to have various health benefits, such as reducing fever, treating digestive issues, and alleviating symptoms of respiratory infections. In herbal preparations, Cynanchum racemosum var. racemosum is often used to make infusions, decoctions, or tinctures, which can be consumed to harness its medicinal properties.
